arts.ttl: Analysis: Revived Foden and De Bruyne offer most threat to Chelsea
arts.sum: When you compare Foden’s shot map from the last six Premier League matches with his 11 previous appearances, you can clearly see how his mindset and positioning has changed. When assessing Foden’s return to form two factors worth considering are firstly, that he is now starting matches regularly, and also that he is finally clear of injury.

arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester City vs. Chelsea injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Manchester City and Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Watch - Cole Palmer: Made in St Kitts
arts.sum: Tracing the origins of Chelsea sensation Cole Palmer to the Caribbean island of St Kitts.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola is set to throw ALL THREE of Man City's £122.5m January new boys straight into action for crunch visit of Chelsea
arts.sum: With injuries continuing to bite, manager Pep Guardiola feels he has little option but to bring the new faces into the reckoning at the Etihad on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca loses key Chelsea figure before Man City as Premier League rival completes raid
arts.sum: He quickly became a key figure in the 49-year-old's backroom staff, following him to Swansea City, Brighton and then Chelsea, where he worked as chief analyst . After over two years at Stamford Bridge, the 38-year-old recruitment analyst will reunite with the Hammers boss, who replaced Julen Lopetegui at the London Stadium earlier this month.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea willing to pay £13m to sign teenager in January, he would immediately join Strasbourg on loan
arts.sum: Chelsea are targeting a move to sign a midfield talent in January that they would send immediately to sister club Strasbourg in France. The transfer...

arts.ttl: Man City fans to get early glimpse of exciting January signing
arts.sum: Manchester City will welcome Claudio Echeverri to their squad next month - but he will be in action sooner than that for his national side

arts.ttl: Chelsea BOMB as Romano reveals 'full agreement' in Garnacho saga
arts.sum: Chelsea are set for a free run at Alejandro Garnacho as Napoli are going all in on alternative target Karim Adeyemi, according to Fabrizio Romano. Chelsea BOMB as Romano reveals 'full agreement' in Garnacho saga

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland's record-breaking City career so far
arts.sum: In his two-and-a-half seasons at City, Haaland has broken countless records, contributing to a historic Treble win in 2023 and a fourth successive Premier League title, UEFA Super Cup and FIFA Club World Cup success the following season. Haaland had a stellar start to his City career and broke a record right from the very outset, becoming the first player to score three hat-tricks in three consecutive home games in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: 'Everyone is writing Man City off too soon - here's what I expect will happen next'
arts.sum: Manchester City's defeat away to Paris Saint-Germain has left their Champions League hopes hanging by a thread but the season is far from over, writes Robbie Savage
